message:
feat: COUNT-LIKE, string projection, and GROUP_CONCAT fast paths, plus formatting and type cleanups

Adds three new PreparedQueryFastPath variants and associated codegen/
connection support, alongside formatting refinements and type hygiene.

## New fast paths (connection.rs)

SimpleCountLikePattern — Direct fast path for SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t
WHERE column LIKE 'pattern'. Uses the SqlLikeFastPathKind classifier
to detect prefix/suffix/contains/exact patterns at prepare time and
evaluates them against MemTable without VDBE execution. Imports the
LIKE fast-path infrastructure from fsqlite-types (classify_sql_like_
fast_path, sql_like_fast_path_matches, SqlLikeFastPathKind).

SimpleStringScalarProjection — Direct fast path for queries like
SELECT LENGTH(col), UPPER(col), SUBSTR(col, start, len) FROM t.
Recognizes LENGTH, UPPER, and SUBSTR applied to a single column and
evaluates them directly from MemTable values. Uses a new
PreparedSimpleStringProjection enum to represent the projection plan.

SimpleGroupConcatByColumn — Direct fast path for SELECT col1,
GROUP_CONCAT(col2, sep) FROM t GROUP BY col1. Iterates MemTable rows,
groups by the first column, and concatenates values directly without
VDBE aggregate machinery.

## query_trace_reason signature fix (connection.rs)

PreparedQueryFastPath::query_trace_reason() now takes &self instead
of self (copy), since the enum now contains non-Copy variants (Arc<str>,
Arc<[PreparedSimpleStringProjection]>). All match arms updated.

## ExactResultRowOutcome boxing (engine.rs)

The Row variant now wraps SmallVec in a Box to reduce stack size.
The enum also derives Eq for consistency.

## Formatting and style cleanup

- cursor.rs: Reformat table_insert_rightmost_hint signature to one line
- connection.rs: Reformat long atomic store/load chains, add
  #[allow(clippy::large_enum_variant)] on RecursiveCteArmExecutionPlan,
  #[allow(clippy::enum_variant_names)] on PreparedQueryFastPath
- engine.rs: Reformat binary_search_by_key chains, SorterCursor
  find_worst_row_index chain, and AggStep/AggFinal registry lookups
- codegen.rs: Reformat grouped_inner_join_count_sum_plan match arms,
  simplify repeated test helper patterns
- perf_runner.rs: Add prepared_direct_insert_* fields to profile
  snapshot initializer in test
- bd_1lsfu_1_operation_baselines.rs: Collapse multi-line function call
  to single line

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+            prepared_direct_insert_memdb_apply_time_ns: 0,
             btree_copy_kernels: BtreeCopyProfileSnapshot {
                 local_payload_copy_calls: 2,
                 local_payload_copy_bytes: 96,
